entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Cultivated peanut (Arachis hypogaea L.), an important grain legume providing high-quality cooking oil and proteins.

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: An important agronomic trait in peanut that significantly affects its economic value.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The most important agronomic trait in peanut.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using diagnostic markers to accelerate the development of improved varieties.

entities.name: QTL-SEQ
entities.description: An approach used to identify genomic regions and candidate genes controlling specific traits.

entities.name: GENOMIC REGIONS
entities.description: Specific segments of the genome that control a particular trait.

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes identified within genomic regions that are likely to control a trait.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE POPULATION
entities.description: A mapping population derived from the cross of Yuanza 9102 and Xuzhou 68-4.

entities.name: YUANZA 9102
entities.description: One of the parent lines used to create the recombinant inbred line population.

entities.name: XUZHOU 68-4
entities.description: One of the parent lines used to create the recombinant inbred line population.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms used to identify candidate genes and develop markers.

entities.name: KASP MARKERS
entities.description: Kompetitive Allele-Specific PCR markers developed for specific SNPs.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME A09
entities.description: A chromosome where one of the overlapped genomic regions for shelling percentage was discovered.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME B02
entities.description: A chromosome where one of the overlapped genomic regions for shelling percentage was discovered.

entities.name: FIVE ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The diverse environmental conditions used to confirm the stability of the identified genomic regions.

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers to select for desired traits in crop improvement.

entities.name: GENE CLONING
entities.description: The process of isolating and characterizing a specific gene.

entities.name: GRAIN LEGUME
entities.description: A category of crops that includes peanut.
